title: OpenClaw Telegram bot stops responding (google provider 404)
root_cause: Manually-defined google provider in models.providers with api: 'openai-responses' causes 404.
fix: Remove the manual google provider block from openclaw.json and agents/main/agent/models.json
category: Never define a manual google provider block in openclaw.json.

title: OpenClaw rewrites model config on startup when alias unresolved
symptom: After container restart, agent models revert to unexpected values.
root_cause: OpenClaw reads config on startup and rewrites it if primary model alias cannot be resolved.
fix: Use full path format for primary and fallbacks: openrouter/<model-id> or google/<model-id>.
prevention: Always use full model paths in primary/fallbacks fields.

title: n8n 2.x webhook URLs return 404 (missing workflowId prefix)
root_cause: n8n 2.x changed webhook URL format from /webhook/{path} to /webhook/{workflowId}/webhook/{path}.
fix: Update all webhook URLs to include the workflowId prefix: /webhook/{workflowId}/webhook/{path}.
prevention: Always use workflowId-prefixed format for new workflows.

title: n8n Webhook node names with spaces break webhook registration
symptom: Webhooks fail to load at n8n startup.
root_cause: Node names with spaces get URL-encoded in the database (%20 substitution), which breaks webhook path matching at startup.
fix: Rename all Webhook nodes to 'Webhook', deactivate the workflow, patch the node names, and restart n8n to re-register paths.
prevention: Always name Webhook nodes exactly 'Webhook' with no spaces.

title: n8n activeVersionId not synced after API PATCH — triggers don't fire
symptom: After updating a workflow via API, cron schedules and webhooks stop firing.
root_cause: API PATCH updates versionId (draft pointer) but NOT activeVersionId (live pointer).
fix: Run SQL to sync: UPDATE workflow_entity SET "activeVersionId"="versionId" WHERE id='{wf_id}';
prevention: After any API workflow update, always sync activeVersionId in DB or perform a full n8n container restart.

title: n8n cron nodes never fire in n8n 2.x
root_cause: Old n8n-nodes-base.cron node type is not compatible with n8n 2.x.
fix: Migrate all cron trigger nodes to n8n-nodes-base.scheduleTrigger typeVersion 1.2.
prevention: Never use cron node type in new workflows.

title: n8n IF node typeVersion 2.1 crashes with caseSensitive bug
symptom: Workflow execution crashes at IF node with TypeError or unexpected behavior.
root_cause: IF node typeVersion 2.1 has a bug with the caseSensitive property that causes crashes when evaluating certain conditions.
fix: Replace IF node with a Code node that returns $input.all() filtered by the condition manually in JavaScript.

title: docker exec into MT5 Wine container fails as root
symptom: docker exec commands to MT5 container fail with WINEPREFIX ownership error.
root_cause: Wine rejects WINEPREFIX directories not owned by the current user.
fix: Always use docker exec -u abc to run as the abc user who owns WINEPREFIX.
prevention: Add -u abc flag to all docker exec commands targeting MT5 Wine containers.

title: socat not pre-installed in MT5 Docker image
symptom: MT5 bridge connection to n8n fails.
root_cause: socat is not included in the base MT5 linuxserver/minetest-derived Docker image.
fix: start.sh automatically runs apt-get install socat on startup if missing.
affected_services: MT5 Demo Terminal,MT5 Live Terminal,EA AI Gateway

title: OpenRouter returns HTTP 402 on all calls including free models
symptom: n8n LangChain agent workflows fail with HTTP 402 Payment Required.
root_cause: OpenRouter billing flags accounts with no credits and blocks all requests with 402, even for free-tier models, when the account accumulates billing errors or usage anomalies.
fix: Clear errorCount and usageStats in auth-profiles.json for the openrouter entry, then switch n8n agents to Gemini direct.
prevention: Use Gemini direct API as primary for all n8n agents.

title: OpenClaw routes anthropic/ model IDs directly to Anthropic API (ignores OpenRouter)
symptom: OpenClaw ignores OPENROUTER_API_KEY for models with anthropic/ prefix.
root_cause: OpenClaw detects the anthropic/ prefix in model IDs and routes directly to Anthropic API, ignoring any OpenRouter configuration.
fix: Use openrouter/ prefix for all models that should route through OpenRouter.
prevention: Always prefix OpenRouter model IDs with openrouter/.

title: numpy >= 2.0 breaks Wine Python in MT5 container
symptom: MT5 rpyc server crashes on startup.
root_cause: Wine Python environment in MT5 containers does not support numpy >= 2.0.
fix: Downgrade numpy inside Wine Python: docker exec -u abc vizion-mt5-demo wine python.exe -m pip install 'numpy<2.0'.
prevention: Pin numpy<2.0 in all Wine Python requirements files.

title: NNDataLogger labels are sparse early in session
symptom: MT5 live labels only appear after closed trades.
root_cause: NNDataLogger captures samples only on executed round trips
fix: so the training set grows slowly during flat or paused sessions.
prevention: Use strategy tester backfill and keep the demo/live flow running long enough to collect labeled samples.
category: Keep a minimum daily closed-trade sample count before retraining.
first_seen: MT5 Demo Terminal,MT5 Live Terminal,NN Server
